summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stories feature and Background Scheduler for Raw Surf OS. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - StoriesBar with tabs (All/Photographers/Surfers), Create Story modal, and story circles all working correctly. Fixed Story model cascade delete issue.

fixed_issues.issue: Story deletion failed with IntegrityError - story_views foreign key constraint not cascading
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Added cascade='all, delete-orphan' to Story.views relationship and changed StoryView.story relationship to use back_populates

critical_code_review_comments: Background scheduler started correctly - logs show 'surf_alerts (15min), story_cleanup (1hr)'
Stories CRUD fully functional: create, read, view, delete
Story expiration set to 24 hours with proper datetime handling
Location visibility logic implemented: free=1mi, basic=5mi, premium=all
Story type differentiation working: photographer vs surf based on author role
Tab filters working: All, Photographers (with camera icon), Surfers (with wave icon)
Story circles show gradient rings - yellow/orange for photographers, cyan/blue for surfers
LIVE badge displays on photographers currently shooting
Create Story modal has Photo/Video toggle, Media URL input, Caption field, Share button
seed_data_creation: Created test stories and story_views during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stories feature fully implemented and tested. StoriesBar component at top of Feed page with tab filters. Background scheduler running APScheduler with surf_alerts check (15min) and story_cleanup (1hr). All stories expire after 24 hours. Location visibility based on subscription tier: free users see location within 1 mile, basic within 5 miles, premium sees all.

verified_features.POST /api/stories: PASS - Creates story with media_url, media_type, caption, location
verified_features.GET /api/stories/feed: PASS - Returns stories grouped by author with photographer/surfer separation
verified_features.GET /api/stories/author/{author_id}: PASS - Returns all active stories from specific author
verified_features.POST /api/stories/{id}/view: PASS - Marks story as viewed, returns view_count
verified_features.POST /api/stories/cleanup-expired: PASS - Manual cleanup endpoint for expired stories
verified_features.Stories_bar_UI: PASS - Appears at top of Feed page
verified_features.Tab_filters: PASS - All, Photographers, Surfers tabs working
verified_features.Story_circles: PASS - Shows author avatar with gradient ring based on type
verified_features.Create_Story_modal: PASS - Photo/Video toggle, URL input, Caption, Share button
verified_features.Location_visibility: PASS - Based on subscription tier and distance
verified_features.Background_scheduler: PASS - APScheduler started with 2 jobs registered
verified_features.Surf_Alerts_page: PASS - Still working after scheduler changes
verified_features.Map_page: PASS - Filter tabs and markers working

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: SQLAlchemy cascade delete not properly configured for Story→StoryView relationship
rca_of_the_issue.reproduction: Create story → Mark as viewed → Delete story → IntegrityError on story_views.story_id
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Added cascade='all, delete-orphan' to Story.views relationship
